commands.review_summary:
The PR bundles security, memory-safety, and performance hardening across media loading, SecretRef exec environments, gateway/agent caches, channel bridge event queues, memory schema SQL construction, terminal writing, TUI local shell commands, and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. The blocking regressions are source-reproducible from the PR diff against current main: local media callers still rely on localRoots: "any", logs treats writer false as stop-output, session fallback needs fresh directory state, and TUI local commands intentionally use shell semantics.
